#  Search for and Filter Drawings (iOS) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Read Only' or higher permissions on the project's Drawings tool.
  * **Additional Information:**
    * If your project uses drawing areas to organize drawings, you can only search drawings in one area at a time. See [What are Drawing Areas?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-are-drawing-areas)
    * When searching for text within drawings:* Only results for vector text can be found. See [What is the difference between raster and vector content in PDFs?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-the-difference-between-raster-and-vector-content-in-pdfs)* Text within drawing markups (e.g. text box markups, linked items) is not included in the search.


##  Steps 
  1. Open the **Procore** app on an iOS mobile device.
  2. Tap the project's **Drawings** tool.


See steps for the following options:
  * Search Drawing Numbers and Titles
  * Search Text Within Drawings
  * Filter Drawings by Discipline


#### Search Drawing Numbers and Titles
  1. Tap the **search** bar.  
![Drawings Ios Search Drawings](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/1b64f4e6ec70f85d2d97b42d3230e7ac/9a65828e6506c461cc14b58c068b001b/drawings-ios-search-drawings.png?fm=webp)
  2. Use the 'Search Modifier' options to search for drawing numbers or titles.
     * **Number** :
       * Tap **+ number** to search for a drawing number.
       * Enter a drawing number (e.g. A111).
     * **Title** :
       * Tap **+ title** to search for a drawing title.
       * Enter a drawing title or a keyword that might be included in the title (e.g. electrical).
  3. As you type, search results display.
  4. Tap a drawing to view its details.   
_Note_ : The search bar will be located at the bottom of the screen when viewing a drawing. You can expand the search panel by tapping on the search bar or by swiping up. The search panel will automatically minimize after tapping a drawing.


#### Search Text Within Drawings
You can search for text that appears within a drawing to see where it appears.
  1. Tap the **search** bar.  
![Drawings Ios Search Drawings](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/1b64f4e6ec70f85d2d97b42d3230e7ac/9a65828e6506c461cc14b58c068b001b/drawings-ios-search-drawings.png?fm=webp)
  2. Enter a keyword or phrase you want to search for.
  3. As you type, search results will be displayed.  
_Note:_ Each drawing that contains the search term will be displayed with the number of results that were found.
  4. Tap on a drawing to view the search term in the context of the drawing.  
_Note:_ The search term will be highlighted each area that it appears on the drawing.
  5. _Optional:_ Tap the search bar to view the list of results or search for another term.


#### Filter Drawings by Discipline
  1. Tap the **Filter** ![Icon Filter Ios](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/378115d4e9f1d0f01833595be1d9e164/b047a01520983533d9a1480d20178fd2/icon-filter-ios.png?fm=webp&h=15) icon.  
![Drawings Ios Filter Drawings](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/fbe9db570f243aa188a0ab9b95c4b553/9147b6795c9db51f467b3ea980597d13/drawings-ios-filter-drawings.png?fm=webp)
  2. Tap the discipline that you want to filter the drawings by.
  3. Tap **Done**.


## See Also
  * [Drawings (iOS) - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/permissions)
  * [Create or Link Coordination Issues on a Drawing (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/create-or-link-coordination-issues-on-a-drawing-ios)
  * [Add Measurements to a Drawing (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/add-measurements-to-a-drawing-ios)
title: Search for and Filter Drawings (iOS)
description: How to use the search and filter options to find drawings on the Procore iOS app.
